title: Anchored Spec — EA Workflow Policy
description: Governance rules for EA entity lifecycle: workflow variants, path-based enforcement, trivial exemptions, and lifecycle gates.

defaultTypes.description: EA change types that default to this variant

requiredSchemas.description: Ordered list of schema profiles this variant requires

skipSkillSequence.description: If true, skip mandatory skill/ceremony sequence

verificationFocus.description: EA verification checks to emphasize for this variant

include.description: Glob patterns — files matching these require a change entity

exclude.description: Glob patterns — files matching these are excluded from this rule

requiredEntities.description: EA entities that must exist for changes matching this rule

commands.description: Verification commands to run for changes matching this rule

broaderCommands.description: Optional wider checks to suggest for changes matching this rule

actionCommands.description: Explicit follow-up actions that may mutate the repo

changeRequiredRules.description: Path-based rules that mandate EA change entities

entityRefs.description: Optional entity refs this rule applies to

entityKinds.description: Optional entity kinds this rule applies to

pathMatches.description: Optional repo-relative path globs used to narrow doc loading

docs.description: Primary docs to load first when the rule matches

secondaryDocs.description: Optional secondary docs to include when the rule matches

readFirstRules.description: Optional rules for conditional read-first document refinement in context assembly

trivialExemptions.description: Glob patterns for paths that never require a change entity

conditions.description: All conditions must be true for chore eligibility

escalationRule.description: What happens when conditions are not met

choreEligibility.description: When a change qualifies as a chore (lightweight workflow)

plannedToActiveRequiresChange.description: Entity can't go active without an associated change entity

activeToShippedRequiresCoverage.description: Entity can't ship without test evidence

deprecatedRequiresReason.description: Entity can't be deprecated without a reason or replacement

lifecycleRules.description: Machine-enforced EA entity lifecycle transition gates

extensions.description: Project-specific policy metadata. Not validated by built-in schemas.
